title: Nicki Daw
compiled_truth: Nicki Daw is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Nicki Daw sent 22 and received 372 emails, totalling 394 interactions. Top correspondents: [Raymond Bowen](people/raymond-bowen) (7), [Kimberly Hillis](people/kimberly-hillis) (7), [David Delainey](people/david-delainey) (6), [Kay Chapman](people/kay-chapman) (6), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (6). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, calendar, inbox, personal.
